content: Control the activation of AI features across {{productName}} and {{organizationName}} editors. When disabled, the {{aiSettings}} section will be hidden, {{aiAgents}} will be unavailable to all users (with history preserved), and the paid {{organizationName}} {{aiServices}} will no longer be accessible. However, all interaction history with the AI will be securely saved and fully restored upon re-enabling {{aiServices}}.

comment.text: This description explains the impact of disabling AI services within the platform. It appears as a tooltip or short explanation in the Portal Settings, specifically within the AI Services Management section, detailing how disabling AI affects features and access while preserving interaction history. Translators should ensure the description accurately conveys the temporary nature of the change and data preservation.
